title: Of Mr. Booker T. Washington and Others
venue: A. C. McClurg and Co., Chicago

license.note: Published 1903; public domain in the United States.

abstract: Of Mr. Booker T. Washington and Others (1903), by W. E. B. Du Bois. From The Souls of Black Folk.
excerpt: From birth till death enslaved; in word, in deed, unmanned! ****** Hereditary bondsmen! Know ye not Who would be free themselves must strike the blow? BYRON. [Illustration] Easily the most striking thing in the history of the American Negro since 1876 is the ascendancy of...
